data.title: Presidio Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results Conference Call
data.description: Presidio Production Company, a leading oil and gas operator (NYSE: FTW) based in Fort Worth, Texas, specializing in acquiring and enhancing producing oil and natural gas wells without drilling, will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 15th. The Company is set to conduct an earnings conference call at 11:00 AM ET / 10:00 AM CT on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes and provide insights.

data.title: Kbank collaborates with Ripple for blockchain remittance trial; tests for overseas transfers as South Korea preps for stablecoin regulations.
data.description: Kbank has joined forces with Ripple to experiment with blockchain-enabled international money transfers, as South Korean businesses brace for upcoming regulations on stablecoins and digital assets. This collaboration aims to explore the potential of utilizing innovative blockchain technology in facilitating cross-border remittances. The move comes at a crucial time as the South Korean financial sector anticipates the implementation of new rules governing stablecoins and digital assets.

data.title: Banking Circle, with MiCA license, enters European stablecoin settlement competition against SocGen, Sygnum, and a 12-bank euro consortium.
data.description: The stablecoin settlement launch by Banking Circle comes after receiving approval for its Crypto Asset Service Provider (CASP). This move enters the company into a competitive market alongside competitors like SocGen, Sygnum, and a consortium of 12 banks focusing on a Euro stablecoin. The entrance of Banking Circle brings a new player with significant potential in the industry.

data.title: $1.2B weekly inflows into crypto investment products, with Bitcoin leading gains. Blockchain equity ETFs also see record demand.
data.description: According to a recent report by CoinShares, cryptocurrency exchange-traded products (ETPs) experienced inflows of $1.2 billion for the fourth consecutive week. This surge in investments was primarily attributed to Bitcoin's significant gains. Additionally, there was a record demand for blockchain equity exchange-traded funds (ETFs).
US EMBASSY SENT A STRONGLY WORDED MESSAGE TO THE COORDINATION FRAMEWORK IN IRAQ- REPORTS

data.title: HCW Biologics Delivers a Major Update for its T-Cell Engager Program Revealing Mechanism of Action and Validating Tissue Factor as Target for Treatment of Solid Tumors
data.description: The top T-Cell Engager, HCW11-018b, has demonstrated effective penetration into the tumor microenvironment, exhibiting strong and specific anti-pancreatic cancer effects.

data.title: Weight Watchers Announces Actions to Utilize Up to $40 million to Pay Down Debt
data.description: On April 27, 2026, WW International, Inc. (NASDAQ: WW), a prominent player in evidence-based weight management, revealed its plan to allocate about $40 million in cash to proactively pay off and diminish the principal sum of its existing term loan.

data.title: Kustom Entertainment will showcase strategic growth at the 16th LD Micro Invitational. #16thAnnualLDmicro #KustomEntertainment
data.description: According to recent data, approximately 3,500 new cases of the virus have been confirmed in the past 24 hours, bringing the total number of cases in the country to over 150,000. Additionally, there have been 75 new fatalities reported, increasing the death toll to nearly 10,000. The government has announced new restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public spaces and limits on social gatherings.Officials are urging the public to adhere to these measures to prevent further spikes in cases and deaths.

data.title: Greenlane Holdings Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: In Boca Raton, Florida, on April 27, 2026, Greenlane Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: GNLN) disclosed that it has met the minimum bid price requirement set by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC ("Nasdaq"). This ensures the Company's continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Additionally, Nasdaq has verified that Greenlane is currently in adherence with all relevant continued listing criteria. Greenlane is a publicly traded digital asset treasury company, focusing on BERA, the native digital asset of the Berachain blockchain network.

data.title: CorMedix Therapeutics Announces Positive Topline Results from Phase III ReSPECT Trial Assessing REZZAYO® for the Prophylaxis of Invasive Fungal Diseases in Allogeneic Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplantation Patients
data.description: The study successfully achieved its main goal by demonstrating non-inferiority when compared to the standard antimicrobial treatment in terms of fungal-free survival at Day 90. This outcome indicates that the new regimen is as effective as the current standard therapy in ensuring survival without fungal infections by the 90th day.

data.title: CADV Ventures S.A. to Combine with Miluna Acquisition Corp to Become a Publicly Listed Company
data.description: In a joint statement released on April 27, 2026, CADV Ventures S.A., an AI software company established in 2017 and based in Warsaw, Poland, specializing in enhancing digital customer interaction for large enterprises ("CADV.AI"), and Miluna Acquisition Corp (NASDAQ: MMTX), a special purpose acquisition company, declared that they have finalized a definitive agreement for a business merger. The merged entity will be named Kukugan Corp., an exempted company based in the Cayman Islands, with its ordinary shares and warrants projected to be listed on a national securities exchange upon completion of the amalgamation.

data.title: S&K Companies Awarded Missile Defense Agency SHIELD IDIQ Contracts
data.description: S&K Global Solutions, LLC based in Polson, Montana, has recently secured the Missile Defense Agency Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) contract. This indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract has a substantial ceiling of $151 billion. The contract is designed to cover various work areas enabling rapid deployment of cutting-edge capabilities to support military operations with enhanced speed and flexibility. Through this agreement, S&K Global Solutions aims to deliver essential services in defense.
ISRAELI MILITARY SAYS IT HAS BEGUN TO STRIKE HEZBOLLAH INFRASTRUCTURE SITES IN LEBANON'S BEQAA VALLEY AND IN ADDITIONAL AREAS ACROSS SOUTHERN LEBANON

data.title: ISS Joins Glass Lewis and Egan-Jones by Supporting Impactive’s Case for Change at WEX
data.description: In New York, Impactive Capital, LP, along with its affiliates, is among the top shareholders of WEX Inc. (NYSE: WEX) holding around 4.9% ownership in the Company. They revealed that Institutional Shareholder Services Inc. (ISS), a prominent proxy advisory firm, has endorsed the election of Impactive's director candidates Kurt Adams and Lauren Taylor Wolfe to the WEX board. This recommendation was made in favor of Impactive by ISS, encouraging shareholders to vote for Adams and Wolfe on the WHITE proxy card.

data.title: Sharon AI Enters Into Definitive Agreements for US$350 Million Convertible Note Offering to Expand GPU and Network Procurement
data.description: SharonAI Holdings Inc. and its subsidiaries have recently disclosed their acquisition of US$350 million in 6% Convertible Senior Notes due in 2031. The Notes will be issued at a price equal to 100% of their principal amount and will be part of a private offering in accordance with Rule 4(a)(2) of the Securities Act of 1933. Sharon AI, a prominent Australian Neocloud company, finalized definitive agreements for this transaction.

data.title: French authorities charge 88, including minors, in crackdown on crypto 'wrench attack', with 135 incidents since 2023.
data.description: Since the year 2023, France has experienced 135 incidents related to cryptocurrency, coinciding with a significant increase in "wrench attacks" across the country.

data.title: ADAMA Introduces Its First Pyrasulfotole-Based Product with the Launch of Marathon® in Australia
data.description: Announced today in Beijing and Tel Aviv, ADAMA Ltd. (SZSE: 000553), a top global crop protection company, has introduced Marathon®, its pioneering weed control and formulation innovation for cereal growers in Australia. This launch signifies a major advancement in crop protection technology within the industry.
SHIPPING TRAFFIC VOLUME THROUGH HORMUZ SIMILAR TO PREVIOUS DAYS - SHIPPING DATA

data.title: Invitation to presentation of the interim report January-March 2026 for Truecaller AB (publ)
data.description: On April 27, 2026, the prominent communication platform Truecaller announced their upcoming release of the interim report for January-March 2026. The report is set to be published on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 07:30 Central European Time. During this presentation, CEO Rishit Jhunjhunwala and CFO Odd Bolin will lead a discussion on the financial performance of the company during this period. Truecaller, known for its emphasis on safe and reliable communication globally, continues to be a key player in the industry. Stay tuned for further insights into the company's operations and financial standings.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Receives Positive FDA Feedback Following Second Type C Meeting on ATH434 Phase 3 Program in Multiple System Atrophy
data.description: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotechnology company listed on ASX and NASDAQ under the symbols ATH and ATHE, respectively, revealed that it had a productive Type C Meeting with the U.S. FDA about the Phase 3 development program for ATH434 in Multiple System Atrophy (MSA). This rare, swiftly advancing neurodegenerative disorder currently lacks any authorized disease-altering remedies. The company's announcement came on April 27, 2026, from Melbourne, Australia, and San Francisco. This development marks a significant step forward in finding solutions for MSA, offering hope to many impacted by the condition.
